title: Skill 06 — visual-identity Input
description: Fields extracted from PHASE-1-OUTPUT.md required to generate the visual brand system

validated_niche.description: Exact niche name as validated in Phase 1 (e.g. 'ADHD productivity for remote workers')

psychographic.description: Single psychographic label from Phase 1 persona analysis (e.g. 'anxious overachiever', 'frustrated side-hustler')

dominant_emotion.description: Primary purchase-trigger emotion driving buyer behavior in this niche

positioning.description: Exact one-sentence positioning statement from Skill 05 output

price_point.description: Product price point in USD — determines typography tier and trust-signal intensity

top_3_uvp.description: Top 3 unique value propositions from Phase 1 validation (exact strings)

competitor_names.description: List of 1-5 direct competitor product or brand names for competitive visual audit
